shell.title: Control Center
shell.intro: Operate Neuroartan documents, offices, roles, verification, credentials, tokens, and publishing from one governed console.

metrics.label: Public legal documents
metrics.detail: Publication candidates linked to source files.

systems.name: Document workspace
systems.detail: Create, edit, move, delete, submit, and publish drafts through the Control Center store.

systems.name: Local folder writer
systems.detail: Uses the browser directory picker when supported; a local backend is required for Safari-grade filesystem automation.

systems.name: Institution registry
systems.detail: Departments, offices, and executive roles are data-driven from the institutional vault.

systems.name: Verification queue
systems.detail: Approval and decline actions are wired for the verification request table.
